name: @yd/api
description: API to search and download YouTube videos in various formats.

scripts.dev: poetry install && poetry run fastapi dev app/main.py --host=0.0.0.0 --port=8080 --reload --reload-dir=../../
scripts.prod: poetry install && poetry run fastapi run app/main.py --host=0.0.0.0 --port=8080
scripts.format: poetry install && poetry run pre-commit run --all-files
scripts.generate:openapi: poetry install && poetry run python generate_openapi.py
scripts.deps:update: poetry update && poetry run pre-commit autoupdate
